_doc: Labeled candidates for the extraction judge-panel discrimination benchmark (mesh extract --judge-eval). 'keep' cases are real durable, non-obvious, reusable learnings the panel SHOULD keep; 'reject' cases are obvious, one-off, generic, or transient notes it SHOULD reject. Measures whether the panel discriminates, not just its keep-rate on already-good extractions.

cases.label: keep
cases.title: pgtype.Text{} is NULL not empty string, breaks $1='' filters
cases.do: filter with IS NULL or a sentinel, not $1=''
cases.dont: assume an unset text column equals ''
cases.why: pgtype.Text{} marshals to NULL, so $1='' never matches it

cases.label: keep
cases.title: Mollie webhooks are unsigned, re-fetch the payment by id
cases.do: on webhook, GET /v2/payments/{id} and trust that, never the body
cases.dont: grant anything from the webhook body or metadata
cases.why: the callback carries no HMAC, so a forged body could self-upgrade an account

cases.label: keep
cases.title: SSRF denylist must include 100.64.0.0/10 (Tailscale CGNAT)
cases.do: reject the CGNAT range on the resolved connect IP per hop
cases.dont: validate only the submitted URL and follow redirects blindly
cases.why: a public URL can 302 to a tailnet host and the fetcher returns its body

cases.label: keep
cases.title: Broken YAML frontmatter silently drops a note from the index
cases.do: keep colon-space values quoted; surface parse errors at index time
cases.dont: assume a .md file is indexed just because it exists
cases.why: ParseFiles skips unparseable notes with no warning, hiding them from search

cases.label: keep
cases.title: Go base64-encodes []byte in JSON responses
cases.do: use json.RawMessage for JSONB columns or convert before serializing
cases.dont: return a []byte field and expect raw JSON
cases.why: encoding/json emits base64 for []byte, corrupting JSONB round-trips

cases.label: keep
cases.title: SQLite WAL never truncates itself, journal_size_limit caps it
cases.do: set journal_size_limit and run a TRUNCATE checkpoint on clean shutdown
cases.dont: rely on passive autocheckpoint to shrink the WAL file
cases.why: passive checkpoint resets the write pointer but never shrinks the file

cases.label: keep
cases.title: chi RealIP trusts X-Forwarded-For from any upstream
cases.do: bound RealIP to the trusted proxy CIDR before rate-limiting on it
cases.dont: key a rate limit off RealIP while it trusts XFF from anyone
cases.why: an unbounded RealIP lets a client spoof its source IP

cases.label: keep
cases.title: Extraction judge must be a different model than the extractor
cases.do: grade precision with an independent model (MESH_JUDGE_*)
cases.dont: let the extractor judge its own output
cases.why: a self-grade rubber-stamps its own candidates and reports ~100%

cases.label: keep
cases.title: em dashes in a value break sqlc code generation
cases.do: author SQL and comments without em dashes
cases.dont: paste an em dash into a query or migration
cases.why: the sqlc pipeline chokes on the character and fails generation

cases.label: keep
cases.title: Empty string for an optional FK violates the constraint
cases.do: use a nil/skip-empty helper for optional foreign keys
cases.dont: write '' for an absent FK value
cases.why: '' is not a valid referenced key, so the insert fails the constraint

cases.label: keep
cases.title: docker network removal breaks legacy composes that still attach to it
cases.do: check what still references a docker network before removing it
cases.dont: rm a shared network because one stack retired
cases.why: other composes declare it external and fail to start once it is gone

cases.label: keep
cases.title: Webhook idempotency by a mutable status flag is replayable
cases.do: gate the grant on a UNIQUE(payment_id) INSERT rowsAffected
cases.dont: check-then-set a boolean or trust an active status for exactly-once
cases.why: a replayed webhook re-runs effects when the guard is a mutable flag

cases.label: reject
cases.title: Fixed the login redirect bug
cases.do: check the redirect path
cases.dont: leave it broken
cases.why: it was broken in this session

cases.label: reject
cases.title: Use environment variables for secrets
cases.do: put secrets in env vars
cases.dont: hardcode secrets
cases.why: hardcoding is insecure

cases.label: reject
cases.title: The prod container was stale so I restarted it
cases.do: restart it
cases.dont: leave it stale
cases.why: it was stale once

cases.label: reject
cases.title: Refactored the handler into smaller functions
cases.do: split large functions
cases.dont: write huge functions
cases.why: smaller functions are cleaner

cases.label: reject
cases.title: Added a test for the new endpoint
cases.do: write tests
cases.dont: skip tests
cases.why: tests are good

cases.label: reject
cases.title: Ran go mod tidy to clean up dependencies
cases.do: run go mod tidy
cases.dont: leave stale deps
cases.why: it cleaned the go.mod

cases.label: reject
cases.title: The deploy succeeded this time
cases.do: deploy
cases.dont: not deploy
cases.why: it worked

cases.label: reject
cases.title: Use meaningful variable names
cases.do: name variables clearly
cases.dont: use x and y
cases.why: clear names help readability

cases.label: reject
cases.title: Commented out the debug log line
cases.do: remove debug logs
cases.dont: ship debug logs
cases.why: it was noisy

cases.label: reject
cases.title: Updated the README with the new command
cases.do: update the README
cases.dont: leave docs stale
cases.why: docs should match the code

cases.label: reject
cases.title: Bumped the version number for the release
cases.do: bump the version
cases.dont: forget to bump
cases.why: the release needed a new version
